title: Here's Why Regency Centers (REG) is an Apt Portfolio Pick Now
text: Regency Centers' (REG) focus on grocery-anchored shopping centers, encouraging expansionary efforts and solid balance-sheet position are likely to aid its performance in the upcoming period.

title: Regency Centers: Bag This Wonderful REIT At A Wonderful Price
text: Regency Centers is a top REIT that's positioned to thrive in the long-term. It has high-quality assets in prime locations, a strong balance sheet, and a solid development pipeline.
